indexes.name: customer_c_custkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Frequent joins with 'orders' table on 'c_custkey' (Q3, Q4, Q6, Q7, Q9, Q12, Q17, Q21, Q22).
indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations and primary key lookups.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_orderkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Frequent joins with 'orders' table on 'l_orderkey' (Q3, Q4, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q9, Q11, Q17, Q18, Q20, Q21, Q22).
indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_partkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Frequent joins with 'part' table on 'l_partkey' (Q7, Q8, Q13, Q16, Q17, Q18, Q19).
indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_suppkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Frequent joins with 'supplier' table on 'l_suppkey' (Q4, Q6, Q8, Q9, Q14, Q19, Q20, Q21).
indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: nation_n_nationkey_idx

indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations and primary key lookups.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: orders_o_custkey_idx

indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: orders_o_orderkey_idx

indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations and primary key lookups.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: part_p_partkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Frequent joins with 'lineitem' and 'partsupp' tables on 'p_partkey' (Q2, Q7, Q8, Q10, Q13, Q15, Q16, Q17, Q18, Q19).
indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations and primary key lookups.

indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations.

indexes.name: partsupp_ps_suppkey_idx

indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: region_r_regionkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Frequent joins with 'nation' table on 'r_regionkey' (Q2, Q4, Q6, Q7).
indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations and primary key lookups.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption (minimal for small table).

indexes.name: supplier_s_suppkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Frequent joins with 'lineitem' and 'partsupp' tables on 's_suppkey' (Q2, Q4, Q6, Q8, Q9, Q10, Q15, Q19, Q20, Q21).
indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations and primary key lookups.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.workload_pattern: Frequent joins with 'nation' table on 's_nationkey' (Q2, Q4, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q9, Q10, Q19, Q20, Q21).
indexes.benefits: Speeds up join operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: region_r_name_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'r_name' in Q2, Q4, Q7.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering on region names.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption (minimal for small table).

indexes.name: supplier_s_acctbal_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Ordering results by 's_acctbal' in Q2.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up sorting operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: customer_c_mktsegment_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'c_mktsegment' in Q3.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: nation_n_name_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Grouping and filtering by 'n_name' in Q4, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q9, Q10, Q19, Q20, Q21.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up grouping and filtering operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_quantity_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering and aggregation on 'l_quantity' in Q5, Q16, Q17, Q18, Q19, Q20.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering and aggregation operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_returnflag_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'l_returnflag' in Q9.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_shipmode_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering, grouping, and ordering by 'l_shipmode' in Q11, Q18.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering, grouping, and ordering operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_receiptdate_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'l_receiptdate' in Q11, Q20, Q21, Q22.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up range filtering operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_commitdate_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'l_commitdate' in Q11, Q20, Q21, Q22.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: orders_o_orderpriority_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Used in conditional aggregation in Q11 and filtering/grouping in Q22.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering and conditional aggregation.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_shipinstruct_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'l_shipinstruct' in Q18.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: supplier_s_name_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Ordering results by 's_name' in Q19, Q20, Q21 and grouping in Q20, Q21.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up sorting and grouping operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: orders_o_orderstatus_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'o_orderstatus' in Q20.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: customer_c_acctbal_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering and aggregation on 'c_acctbal' in Q21.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering and aggregation operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_shipdate_returnflag_linestatus_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'l_shipdate' and then grouping/ordering by 'l_returnflag', 'l_linestatus' in Q1.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for filtering, grouping, and ordering. Can potentially allow index-only scans.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: partsupp_ps_partkey_supplycost_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Subquery in Q2, finding MIN(PS_SUPPLYCOST) for a given PS_PARTKEY.
indexes.benefits: Significantly speeds up the correlated subquery by allowing efficient lookup and minimum finding.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: orders_o_orderdate_shippriority_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'o_orderdate' and grouping by 'o_shippriority' in Q3.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for filtering and grouping.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_shipdate_quantity_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'l_shipdate' and 'l_quantity' in Q5.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for combined filtering conditions.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: orders_o_orderdate_custkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'o_orderdate' and joining on 'o_custkey' in Q7.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for filtering and joining.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: nation_n_name_n_nationkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'n_name' and joining on 'n_nationkey' in Q10.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for filtering and joining.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: partsupp_ps_partkey_supplycost_availqty_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Grouping by 'ps_partkey' and calculating aggregates in Q10, potentially enabling index-only scans.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up grouping and aggregation.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_receiptdate_commitdate_shipdate_shipmode_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Multiple filters on date columns and 'l_shipmode' in Q11.
indexes.benefits: Significantly improves performance for complex filtering conditions.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_shipdate_partkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'l_shipdate' and joining on 'l_partkey' in Q13.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for filtering and joining.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_shipdate_suppkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'l_shipdate' and grouping by 'l_suppkey' in Q14.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for filtering and grouping.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: part_p_brand_type_size_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering, grouping, and ordering by these columns in Q15.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for complex filtering, grouping, and ordering.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: part_p_brand_container_partkey_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'p_brand' and 'p_container' and joining on 'p_partkey' in Q16.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for filtering and joining.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_partkey_quantity_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Correlated subquery in Q16, calculating AVG(L_QUANTITY) for a given L_PARTKEY.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up the correlated subquery.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_orderkey_quantity_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Subquery in Q17, grouping by 'l_orderkey' and summing 'l_quantity'.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up the subquery by allowing efficient grouping and aggregation.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: orders_o_totalprice_orderdate_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Ordering results by 'o_totalprice' DESC and 'o_orderdate' in Q17.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up sorting operations.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: part_p_partkey_brand_container_size_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Joining on 'p_partkey' and filtering by 'p_brand', 'p_container', 'p_size' in Q18.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for complex filtering and joining.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_partkey_shipmode_shipinstruct_quantity_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Joining on 'l_partkey' and filtering by 'l_shipmode', 'l_shipinstruct', 'l_quantity' in Q18.
indexes.benefits: Improves performance for complex filtering and joining.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_partkey_suppkey_quantity_shipdate_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Correlated subquery in Q19, filtering by 'l_partkey', 'l_suppkey', 'l_shipdate' and summing 'l_quantity'.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up the correlated subquery.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: partsupp_ps_partkey_suppkey_availqty_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by 'ps_partkey' and 'ps_availqty' and returning 'ps_suppkey' in Q19.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up the subquery.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and storage consumption.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_orderkey_suppkey_receiptdate_commitdate_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Correlated subqueries in Q20, filtering and comparing date columns.
indexes.benefits: Significantly speeds up the EXISTS and NOT EXISTS conditions.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: lineitem_l_orderkey_commitdate_receiptdate_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Correlated subquery in Q22, joining on 'l_orderkey' and filtering by date comparisons.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up the EXISTS condition.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased write overhead and larger index size.

indexes.name: customer_c_phone_partial_idx
indexes.workload_pattern: Filtering by country code derived from 'c_phone' in Q21.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up filtering on specific country codes, reducing index size compared to a full index.
indexes.tradeoffs: Only useful for queries matching the WHERE clause, increased write overhead.
